prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for acrolein (8 atoms: O, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF (RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-center integrals (no density fitting / RI). Geometry taken from the user-supplied acrolein.xyz (not re-optimized). N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). Integrity: status=ok, trustworthy=true; sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f-)=1.0000. No engine warnings reported. Headline value reported is the maximum f+ (most electrophilic site): atom 4 (carbonyl C), f+ = 0.64232102. Full per-atom results: f+(O,C,C,C,H,H,H,H) = [0.40136, 0.02226, 0.43405, 0.64232, −0.15726, −0.20720, −0.06212, −0.07341]; f−= [0.39389, 0.00599, 0.09140, 0.08737, 0.08596, 0.18568, 0.08449, 0.06523]; dual descriptor = [+0.00748, +0.01627, +0.34264, +0.55495, −0.24322, −0.39288, −0.14660, −0.13863]. Most electrophilic site: C(4) (carbonyl carbon), f+ = 0.64232102. Most nucleophilic site: O(1), f− = 0.39389. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1.
